synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-28053 Oracle Linux 9 freeradius bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28053
full_text:

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28053.html
